decisions.decision: Live refresh: local clock tick every second, no card I/O between 30s window boundaries

decisions.decision: Add account UX: sequential wizard via push_screen_deferred
Credential row density: name + code + type badge + countdown bar
HOTP: require explicit Enter to consume counter
decisions.rationale: Safer default, prevents accidental counter advancement
